summary: Unmerged WIP PR adding and typing a batch of matches across the menu diagram files mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3. The work replaced many placeholder prototypes with concrete signatures, implemented several menu/stat helper functions, added cleanup/destructor and animation-end callbacks, and introduced needed baselib/menu includes and externs. The author closed it to reorganize with additional matches across the same files, so the changes are useful as evidence of matching approaches but were not accepted as-is.

key_files.role: Main source file for newly implemented mnDiagram functions, stat totals, navigation helpers, destructor callbacks, animation callback, and GObj/JObj setup.
Converted many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations to concrete signatures using s32, u8, void, HSD_GObj, and typed arguments.
Added first batch of mndiagram2 implementations including animation-end callback, SisLib cleanup, and menu-flow initialization/GObj proc setup.
Created header guard and prototypes for fn_80244D20, fn_80245028, and mnDiagram2_802453B0.
Added fn_80246E04 animation callback that checks mn_8022ED6C against an end-frame table and unlinks the GObj.
Added address-commented prototype for fn_80246E04 and retained fn_80246F0C.
Added extern for mnDiagram_803EE774 animation loop settings/table.
Expanded typed prototypes for menu rule functions used or adjacent to diagram matching.
Replaced numerous placeholder name-menu function prototypes with concrete return and argument types.
Small prototype/header adjustment; exact details are not present in the provided excerpt.

what_changed: Implemented mnDiagram_8023EA54 as a language-dependent threshold check using lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS, returning true at 0x274A6 for US language and 0x186A0 otherwise.

Implemented stat aggregation helpers GetNameTotalKOs, GetNameTotalFalls, GetFighterTotalKOs, and GetFighterTotalFalls using GetPersistentNameData/GetPersistentFighterData, GetNameText or mn_8022E950 validity checks, u16 reads, and loop bounds 0x78 for names and 0x19 for fighters.
Added clamping in GetNameTotalFalls to cap totals above 999999.
Implemented mnDiagram_8023F334 to write decimal digits into a buffer using mn_8022EB78 for digit count, mn_8022EB24 for digit extraction, and mnDiagram_804D4FA4 as the terminator.

Implemented previous/next selection helpers mnDiagram_8023F3A8, mnDiagram_8023F45C, and mnDiagram_8023F4CC that scan backward or forward until a valid name/fighter entry is found, returning the original index if no valid entry is found.
Implemented mnDiagram_8023FDD8 to count valid fighter entries by looping over 0x19 and calling mn_8022E950.
Implemented fn_80240B18 as a destructor/free routine that conditionally releases several SisLib objects at offsets 0x38 through 0x48 with HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4 before HSD_Free.

Implemented fn_80241AE8, fn_80244D20, and fn_80246E04 as animation callbacks that read per-GObj data at offset 0x2C, fetch a JObj at data offset 0x0C, call mn_8022ED6C, and unlink with HSD_GObjPLink_80390228 when the current frame reaches the table end frame.
Implemented mnDiagram_802433AC to create a GObj, load a joint from mnDiagram_804A0814, attach the JObj, set up GX link with HSD_GObj_JObjCallback, and install fn_80243038 as a process.
Implemented mnDiagram2_802453B0 to initialize MenuFlow fields, call mnDiagram2_80245178(0), create a GObj/proc, and copy bits from HSD_GObj_804D783C into the GObj flags byte at offset 0xD.
Added concrete prototypes and baselib forward includes in mndiagram.h, mndiagram2.h, mndiagram3.h, mnmainrule.h, and mnname.h.
The PR remained WIP and was closed by the author for reorganization rather than merged.
smart_moves: Replaced broad UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with concrete signatures once call-site behavior and argument sizes were inferred, improving type pressure for adjacent matches.
Used address-commented prototypes in headers, preserving the decomp convention that links functions to DOL offsets while refining types.

Grouped similar animation-end callbacks across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3 around the same pattern: read GObj user data, find JObj, use mn_8022ED6C with an animation settings table, then unlink on end-frame.
Used small dummy stack arrays or dummy locals in several functions, which suggests stack-shape preservation for matching where the source logic alone may not emit the original frame layout.
Handled cleanup defensively by null-checking SisLib object pointers before releasing them and freeing the parent allocation afterward.
Introduced local extern declarations only for symbols needed by the current matches, allowing incremental matching before full header cleanup.
Used u8 casts and explicit byte-pointer arithmetic around persistent stats and selection arrays, matching the observed small-index storage and packed-data access patterns.
decomp_lessons: Menu diagram stat helpers use fixed loop counts: 0x78 for name slots and 0x19 for fighter entries; preserving these bounds is likely important for matching and semantics.

Persistent stat data is accessed as u16 arrays behind void pointers, with index-derived byte offsets; use explicit u8* pointer arithmetic and u16 loads rather than inventing structs too early when layout evidence is incomplete.
When converting headers away from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, include baselib forward headers so HSD_GObj and related pointer types can be named without pulling full definitions.
Animation callbacks in these menu files share a reusable idiom: data = gobj + 0x2C, jobj = data + 0x0C, compare mn_8022ED6C result to an end-frame field/table entry, then call HSD_GObjPLink_80390228.
For GObj/JObj setup functions, the matching order matters: create GObj, load joint, attach object, set GX link, then create the process callback.
Language-dependent numeric thresholds can be simple decompable branches rather than table lookups; mnDiagram_8023EA54 checks lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS before choosing the threshold.
If a PR is a broad WIP sweep across several files, reorganizing into smaller batches may make review and integration easier; the author explicitly closed this PR to reorganize with more matches.
naming_conventions: Unidentified menu diagram functions retain the project’s address-based names such as mnDiagram_8023F334, fn_80240B18, mnDiagram2_802453B0, and fn_80246E04.
Extern data symbols follow file/address naming such as mnDiagram_804D4FA4, mnDiagram_804A0814, mnDiagram2_803EEB60, and mnDiagram3_803EEC10.
Header prototypes are prefixed with address comments like /* 23FDD8 */ and /* 2453B0 */.
Known semantic helpers keep descriptive names such as GetNameTotalKOs, GetFighterTotalFalls, GetHitPercentage, GetPlayPercentage, GetAveragePlayerCount, GetNameText, and IsNameUnique.
The PR uses mixed file-prefix capitalization already present in the codebase: mnDiagram for main diagram symbols and mnDiagram2/mnDiagram3 for related files.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used explicit casts to u8 for indices and pointer arithmetic to control load sizes and offsets.
Inserted unused dummy locals or arrays, e.g. dummy[4], dummy[8], and dummy = 0, likely to force original stack layout or instruction scheduling.
Used do-while scans in selection helpers to match decrement/increment-before-check control flow.
Temporarily defined GetNameText as GetNameText_u8 around GetNameTotalKOs, suggesting a type/signature workaround to match a call requiring an unsigned-byte argument form.
Kept local function and data externs in source files for symbols not yet fully represented in shared headers.
Manipulated a GObj flags byte directly with masking and shifting: *ptr = (*ptr & ~0x30) | ((val & 3) << 4), preserving packed bitfield behavior without naming the structure field.
Used table representations flexibly: AnimLoopSettings for known tables and f32 arrays where the excerpt only supports raw indexing.

review_feedback.text: Author described the PR as WIP while cleaning up and gathering functions with matches.
Author closed the PR to reorganize it with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3.
No review comments or formal reviews are present in the provided context.

follow_up_queries: Find the reorganized successor PRs by itsgrimetime touching src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c, mndiagram2.c, or mndiagram3.c after PR 2080 closed.
Check whether mnDiagram_8023EA54 and the stat total helpers later merged with the same signatures and constants.
Search later PRs for finalized struct definitions replacing the raw offsets used in fn_80240B18, fn_80241AE8, fn_80244D20, and fn_80246E04.
Verify whether the GetNameText_u8 macro workaround was preserved, replaced by a proper prototype, or removed during reorganization.
Look for review or merge feedback in successor PRs about the dummy stack locals and local extern declarations used here.
